violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The back of the ice machine is dusty.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Rinsed blending pitchers were placed on cloth towels above the front sink they are rinsed in.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. A gallon container with a pump was placed in the back hand sink for the dish area. No items must be placed in the hand sink.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
